case_title: ROSEMARY SULLIVAN VS. BLAIR LUDWIG et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SULLIVAN, ROSEMARY AS TO DEFENDANT LUDWIG, BLAIR LUDWIG, ELISA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-17-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-22-2002

MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-20-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST WALTER C. COOK, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-20-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-04-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARY J. HINDS. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-20-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-06-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-06-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
